source_note: Direct Testimony of Ryan D. Jones on behalf of Entergy Louisiana, LLC, in Entergy Louisiana's Application for Review of the Management of the Construction of Lake Charles Power Station, before the Louisiana Public Service Commission, filed December 2021 (received December 9, 2021; public version, 17 pp). The Lake Charles Power Station (an approximately $872 million natural-gas plant; commercial operation March 28, 2020) was approved as prudent in LPSC Order No. U-34283 (July 20, 2017); this proceeding reviews the prudence of the project's construction management. The review-proceeding docket number is obscured in the public-redacted filing. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: LPSC public docket portal, file 3SIDvL86aGQ= (lpscpubvalence.lpsc.louisiana.gov/portal/PSC/ViewFile?fileId=3SIDvL86aGQ%3D).
